improvements.change: Require explicit mapping from acceptance-criteria wording to alert aggregation operators (for example, "any execution > 90s" must use `Maximum`, not `Average`).

When an issue mentions an "existing" action group, instruct implementor to either reference an existing resource ID or document why creating/reusing a module-local shared action group satisfies the requirement.
Require a post-implementation verification checklist for deployability and portal visibility criteria, including specific workflow run links or Azure CLI checks.
